title: deletePublicChat broadcasts deletion before DB delete — inconsistent state on DB failure
description: deletePublicChat broadcasts deletion and removes from memory before the database delete. If the DB delete fails, state is inconsistent: clients see the chat as deleted but it still exists in the database.
recommendation: Perform the database delete first, then broadcast and remove from memory only on success.
patch_notes: Reordered to DB-delete-first, then remove from memory and broadcast on success
